rationale: Checked content-type before parsing JSON in fetchApi.
Conditionally set Content-Type in fetchApi only when no custom Content-Type is provided and body is present.
Ensured package.json command explicitly invokes python instead of poetry to maintain compatibility across CI environments.
Added openapi.json to .gitignore to prevent accidental artifact commits.
Removed api:types:check from docker-publish.yml pipeline since python is not installed.
Updated docs/tmp/063-UI-TypeScriptSystem.md to reflect that api:types script exists and generates openapi.ts correctly.
Fixed UI build dist path in README.md.
Gated logging suppression in tools/export_openapi.py behind EXPORT_OPENAPI_QUIET env var.
The pytest unit tests pipeline already installs python configuration properly and executes via python without poetry.
Adjusted useProfile API path to /api/me and updated ProfileResponse interface to align with backend UserProfileReadSanitized.
